name: CUA-checkers task manifest
description: Phased orchestration plan. Source of truth for build phases. Backed by specs.json for requirement-level tracking.

rules.no_deletion: Agents (orchestrator and teammates alike) MUST NOT delete items from this manifest. Items may only have their `status` field updated. New items may be appended (e.g., when reviews surface new work); existing items must never be removed, renamed away, or reset to a pre-existing terminal status.

status_values.todo: Not yet started; ready when dependencies (if any) clear.
status_values.in_progress: Actively being worked on by the orchestrator's main thread.
status_values.delegated: In flight on a teammate. Track via TaskList under ~/.claude/tasks/cua-checkers/.
status_values.deferred: Blocked-by-design on an upstream phase. Activates when its `blocked_by` dependencies all reach `done`.
status_values.recurring: Quality gate that fires repeatedly (e.g., per-commit, pre-push). Never reaches a terminal state during the loop.
status_values.done: Phase fully closed; corresponding specs.json items flipped to `done`; landing commit recorded in `evidence`.

rules.transition_done_to_in_progress_note: Permitted only when a downstream review surfaces a regression on a previously-closed phase; record the reason on the item's `notes` field.

process.tdd: Red-Green-Refactor; 100% line+branch+function+statement coverage of src/ before push.
process.delegation: Orchestrator (opus) delegates ALL implementation to sonnet teammates created via TeamCreate. Adversarial reviews via codex plugin only.
process.loop_termination: All manifest phases reach `done` (excluding `recurring` gates) AND specs.json has zero open entries AND latest pre-push review reports clean AND latest post-push review reports clean.

phases.title: Scaffold seeds
phases.details: package.json, next.config.mjs, jsconfig.json, src/lib/checkers.js, src/lib/store.js, .gitignore, legacy/ move

phases.title: Dev infra: vitest + 100% coverage thresholds
phases.details: checkers.js and store.js are temporarily excluded from coverage; excludes removed in Phases 2 & 3.

phases.title: TDD rules engine (Q-202)
phases.evidence: tests/rules.test.js (43 tests, 100% coverage on src/lib/checkers.js); finding F-019 logged.

phases.title: TDD store (Q-203)
phases.evidence: commit 22654af — tests/store.test.js (33 tests, 100% coverage on src/lib/store.js)

phases.title: server.js + src/lib/wsHandler.js
phases.evidence: commit c98f5ca — server.js + src/lib/wsHandler.js; 18 tests, 100% coverage on wsHandler.js; F-015 done, F-013 in_progress

phases.title: TDD REST API routes
phases.evidence: commit 3eae194 — tests/api.test.js (13 tests, 100% coverage on all 3 route files); F-012 and Q-204 done

phases.title: TDD WebSocket protocol
phases.evidence: commit 92dcb9e — tests/ws.test.js (17 integration tests, 100% coverage on server.js); F-013 done; Q-205 done

phases.title: Next.js client + role-color theming
Per-commit codex adversarial review
phases.details: gpt-5.4-mini xhigh via codex:codex-rescue subagent. Fires after each implementation commit. Findings are appended as new spec entries with status=todo and as new manifest phases.

phases.title: Pre-push codex adversarial review
phases.details: gpt-5.5 high via codex:codex-rescue subagent. Gates every push to origin.

phases.title: Push to origin when all gates green
Iterate on findings
phases.details: Absorb every review/test finding as new spec entries and new manifest phases; re-enter loop. Terminates only when loop_termination conditions hold.

phases.title: Fix store.joinSocket idempotency (F-RVW-9d6491e-2)
phases.details: Clear previous role membership for a socket before reassigning, or return the current role when the socket is already registered. Phase 4 should land first since server-impl touches adjacent code.
phases.evidence: commit 5e174b0 — store.js early-return on rolesByWs.has(ws); 5 new idempotency tests added to tests/store.test.js (38 total); store.js 100% coverage

phases.title: Audit Next 15.1.6 advisory and upgrade (F-RVW-9d6491e-4)
phases.details: Verify npm advisory for next@15.1.6; bump to patched release if available; regenerate package-lock.json.
phases.evidence: next bumped 15.1.6 → 15.5.18; eslint-config-next bumped to match; package-lock.json regenerated; 108 tests 100% coverage; advisory counts: before critical:1/high:0/moderate:1/low:2, after critical:0/high:0/moderate:2/low:2 (remaining moderate = postcss XSS via Next bundled dep, fix requires Next 9.x downgrade — not applicable)

phases.title: server.js: wire server.listen error handler so createApp rejects on EADDRINUSE/etc (F-RVW-c98f5ca-1)
phases.details: Replace single-listener listen Promise with server.once('error', reject) + server.once('listening', resolve) so port-in-use surfaces as a rejection instead of a hang.
phases.evidence: tests/server.test.js (4 tests, 100% coverage on server.js); server.once('error', reject) + wss.close() on error wired in server.js

phases.title: server.js: enforce Origin allowlist on /ws upgrade to mitigate CSWSH (F-RVW-c98f5ca-2)
phases.details: Validate req.headers.origin against ALLOWED_ORIGINS env (defaulting to localhost in dev). Reject disallowed upgrades with 403 + socket.destroy. Combined with Phase 16 input validation.
phases.notes: Awaiting Phase 6 landing; will be tackled by a `ws-protocol-hardening` teammate post-Phase-6
phases.evidence: commit a3bffc6 — ALLOWED_ORIGINS env; 403+destroy on missing/disallowed; wildcard '*' bypasses check; tests: 4 origin tests in tests/ws.test.js; server.js 100% coverage

phases.title: server.js: graceful shutdown + unhandled rejection handling on CLI bootstrap (F-RVW-c98f5ca-3)
phases.details: Add .catch on createApp, install SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers that wss.close() then server.close() with a drain timeout.
phases.evidence: tests/server.test.js (4 tests, 100% coverage on server.js); SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers + .catch(err => process.exit(1)) wired in server.js CLI block

phases.title: wsHandler/server: cap WebSocket payload size and rate-limit control messages (F-RVW-c98f5ca-4)
phases.details: Construct WebSocketServer with maxPayload (e.g. 8 KiB). Add per-socket token bucket on reset/undo to prevent broadcast flooding.
phases.notes: Awaiting Phase 6 landing; will be tackled by a `ws-protocol-hardening` teammate post-Phase-6
phases.evidence: commit a3bffc6 — maxPayload:8*1024 (WS_MAX_PAYLOAD env); token bucket 10ops/5s (WS_RATE_LIMIT_OPS/WS_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS); ws.on('error') suppresses WS_ERR_UNSUPPORTED_MESSAGE_LENGTH; rate-limit tests in wsHandler.test.js + ws.test.js; payload cap test in ws.test.js; wsHandler.js + server.js 100% coverage

phases.title: wsHandler/server: validate query.game and query.as (reject arrays, allowlist roles, bound id length) (F-RVW-c98f5ca-5)
phases.details: Coerce array query params to first value or reject; restrict gameId to ^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{1,64}$; validate as ∈ {red, black, observer} or treat as auto-assign.
phases.notes: Awaiting Phase 6 landing; will be tackled by a `ws-protocol-hardening` teammate post-Phase-6
phases.evidence: commit a3bffc6 — validateGameId() exported from store.js; array coercion; E_INVALID_GAMEID + ws.close(1008); E_INVALID_ROLE + ws.close(1008); 11 query-validation tests in wsHandler.test.js; wsHandler.js + store.js 100% coverage

phases.title: wsHandler: add per-game seq + requestId echo for move/state correlation (F-RVW-c98f5ca-6)
phases.details: Maintain monotonic seq on each game; include seq on every state/presence broadcast. Echo client-supplied requestId on success/error reply so clients can correlate inflight moves.
phases.notes: Awaiting Phase 6 landing; will be tackled by a `ws-protocol-hardening` teammate post-Phase-6
phases.evidence: commit a3bffc6 — freshGame() adds seq:0; broadcastAll() stamps g.seq++ on every message; requestId echoed in ack/error; seq+requestId tests in wsHandler.test.js + ws.test.js; wsHandler.js + store.js 100% coverage

phases.title: Differentiated HTTP status codes for /moves error flavors (F-RVW-3eae194-1)
REST gameId allowlist + length cap via shared validateGameId helper (F-RVW-3eae194-2)
Add spec entries for POST /api/games + DELETE /api/games/:id (F-RVW-3eae194-3)
REST DELETE /api/games/:id must broadcast state after resetGame (F-RVW-3eae194-4)
Add broadcast spy assertion to POST /moves tests (F-RVW-3eae194-5)
Add missing behavior assertions to api.test.js (F-RVW-3eae194-6)
DELETE non-existent id must return 404 + E_NOT_FOUND instead of creating game (F-RVW-3eae194-7)
Normalize response envelopes across all REST route files (F-RVW-3eae194-8)
Async graceful shutdown for SIGINT/SIGTERM (F-RVW-batch1-2)
phases.evidence: server.js: export async function shutdown(signal, {server, wss}). Tests: tests/server.test.js shutdown() describe block (5 tests): active client close frame 1001, zero clients, hung client force-terminate, client.close()+terminate() throw branches, outer 5s safety net. server.js 100% statements/branches/functions/lines. Commit SHA: 9f2abf0.

phases.title: WS backpressure + heartbeat (F-RVW-batch1-3)
Stabilize test suite: per-file timeout or pool-split for tests/server.test.js (F-INFRA-1)

in_flight_reviews.note: Spawned as a non-team background Agent — predates the orchestrator's clarified rule that ALL parallel work is via team teammates. Future codex reviews will be spawned with team_name='cua-checkers'.
